# Transcrição: 64. Trait 63 - Great Salespeople follow up relentlessly.

- **Fonte:** 64. Trait 63 - Great Salespeople follow up relentlessly.
- **Duração:** 02:01
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 02:01]

Great salespeople follow up relentlessly like like I mean just relentless without thought completely whacked follow-up. I recently followed up on a client 15 phone calls my wife we were on vacation my wife says how many times you're gonna call that man Grant I said I don't know let me see how many times I've called him there oh I got 15 on here in three days that's five calls a day with no return phone call my wife looked at me says it's not working it's not working I said well it's not working yet it worked on you she's like what do you mean I said I called you for 13 months see relentless you want to be relentless why would you make ten phone calls and not make the 11th one look what you're doing is insane now why would you spend three months working on a transaction and give up because it didn't work out you got three months invested and then what most average salespeople do or even good salespeople do is they give up on the three month deal and go start another deal for three months look you got to learn how to finish and part of finishing is following up relentlessly do you know what I mean by the word relentless I mean without reason I mean relentless I mean where other people think dude what is wrong with you you call me twice in one hour how about twice in one hour every hour today until you call me back how about on the 16th to the call 16th call to the guy in Memphis it was like look I left 15 messages front for you in the last three days if I don't hear back from you I'm just going to go ahead and ship the product boom got call me back in four seconds no no no hold up Grant see that's what I'm talking about follow up relentless follow them home stalk them stalk them if you got to okay because you care so much because you got you got a great product great I can't do that then you don't believe in you you don't believe in your product or you don't believe in your company because if you did you'd be relentless look it's not encouraged in our culture to be relentless follow up relentless be great don't be average
